title: Constructed First Impressions
entries: The common room is {table:gm/tavern/impression-crowd}. It smells of {table:gm/tavern/impression-smell}, and beneath the noise you hear {table:gm/tavern/impression-sound}.

The common room is {table:gm/tavern/impression-crowd}, thick with the smell of {table:gm/tavern/impression-smell} and {table:gm/tavern/impression-smell}. Over it all: {table:gm/tavern/impression-sound}.
